overall.description: A cinematic slow pan across a stormy suburban garden patio at dusk, showcasing outdoor furniture, a swimming pool, and a gazebo under dramatic dark clouds. The footage appears to be from a high-end game engine with dense vegetation and atmospheric lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor dining patio with grill and furniture

agents.ego_description: slowly panning across the patio deck, observing the garden and stormy sky

entered.detail: silver dome-shaped barbecue grill on the wooden deck
circular glass-top patio table with metal chairs
bushes with white flowers along the deck edge
massive oak tree draped with Spanish moss
large yellow historic mansion visible through the trees
closed patio umbrella near the bushes

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wooden deck patio with outdoor dining furniture and a silver grill. A massive oak tree with Spanish moss dominates the background, with a yellow historic mansion visible beyond. Pink flowering trees and white bushes add color to the scene under dark storm clouds.

events.description: swimming pool becomes visible on the right side of the deck

agents.ego_description: continuing to pan right, revealing the pool area and focusing on the flowering tree

entered.detail: rectangular swimming pool with stone coping along the deck edge
low stone wall bordering the pool area

segments.scene_description: As the camera pans right, the swimming pool comes into view on the right side, bordered by a stone wall. The pink flowering tree moves to the center of the frame while the patio furniture and grill move out of view to the left. The historic mansion and large oak tree shift to the left background.

events.description: wooden gazebo enters view on the right
camera tilts upward to focus on the stormy sky through the tree canopy

agents.ego_description: tilting upward to view the stormy sky through the tree canopy and gazebo structure

entered.detail: octagonal wooden gazebo with dark roof and open sides
flowering branches with pink blossoms hanging overhead in the foreground

segments.scene_description: The camera continues panning right and begins tilting upward, revealing a wooden gazebo that becomes the central focus. Overhanging cherry blossom branches frame the top of the shot. The patio furniture and pool exit the frame, while the view opens up to the dramatic stormy sky above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera pan across a stormy suburban patio that shifts from a detailed domestic setting to an expansive view of a dramatic sky. It begins on a wooden deck featuring outdoor dining furniture and a silver grill, set against the backdrop of a historic yellow mansion and a massive oak tree draped in Spanish moss. As the camera pans right, the patio furniture recedes to the left to make room for a stone-bordered swimming pool, while pink flowering trees drift toward the center of the frame. The movement then continues right and begins to tilt upward, causing the pool to exit the frame as a wooden gazebo becomes the central focus. Finally, the view opens fully toward the dark storm clouds above, framed by overhanging cherry blossom branches at the top of the shot.
